## Plugin reference

- Description: Flat 4px-tall pill segments with a single tooltip.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `SegmentedProgressBar.Variant` "Segmented" → `SegmentedRenderer`
  - Uses: `ui/segmented-progress-bar.SegmentedProgressBarSlots`
